title: Golioth Device
description: Schema for a Golioth Device resource returned by the Management API. A Device is the canonical record of an embedded thing connected to Golioth, scoped to a project.

id.description: Unique device identifier assigned by Golioth (MongoDB-style ObjectId).

projectId.description: Identifier of the parent Golioth project.

name.description: Human-readable device name. Unique within a project.

hardwareIds.description: Hardware identifiers (e.g. MAC, IMEI, serial) registered for the device.

tagIds.description: List of tag identifiers attached to the device.

blueprintId.description: Identifier of the blueprint (hardware/software profile) the device is associated with, if any.

enabled.description: Whether the device is allowed to connect to Golioth.

lastReport.description: Timestamp of the device's last data report or connection.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata attached to the device by API consumers.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the last update.
